name: James MacDonald
role: Founder and Former Senior Pastor, Harvest Bible Chapel, Rolling Meadows, Illinois
incident: James MacDonald, founder of Harvest Bible Chapel which grew to 13,000 members, was fired by the church's elders on February 12, 2019 after recordings surfaced in which he made vulgar statements about colleagues and a journalist investigating him. Subsequent investigations documented that MacDonald had pressured church staff to make fraudulent insurance claims, improperly used church funds for personal expenses including a hunting ranch, and led a pattern of bullying and spiritual abuse spanning years.
